flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Renton Technical College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.1k → $7.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Renton Technical College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (57.4% → 45.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Renton Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $6.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Renton Technical College rose 69% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 1.8k).
